location: Dropped by armored dual-wielding 'Bandit' Skeletons (and Bestial Skeletons). The most reliable single farming spot is the graveyard just outside the Church of Pilgrimage, at the northern tip of the Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: Rest at the Church of Pilgrimage grace and head into the graveyard right outside it — several armored skeletons there dual-wield this sword
These skeletons reassemble after being knocked down unless finished off or hit with fire/holy; you may need to re-kill the same ones repeatedly while farming
Drop chance is low per source, and it can drop twice from a single enemy since they carry two, so bring Arcane/Discovery boosts (Silver Scarab talisman) if farming
The exact same enemy type and weapon also spawn in Caelid, Altus Plateau, and Crumbling Farum Azula, in case you'd rather farm one of those instead
lore: A light, crescent-bladed sword favored by the bandits who preyed on the chaos after the Shattering. Years of neglect have left the blade rusted and dark, but it can still serve a nimble-handed wielder well enough.

builds.name: Early Strength/Dexterity quality pick
builds.why: Even D/D scaling and modest 11 Str / 13 Dex requirements make it an easy, no-fuss quality-build weapon for the opening hours.
